[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 100100100 3
2 111110111 8
3 000011111 5
4 101010101 5

6 101001000 3
7 001010110 4

70 07 101010111 6
